overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night during light rain. The scene features a circular outdoor bar with neon purple stools wrapped around large trees, surrounded by holographic advertisements and glass buildings. Various NPCs sit and interact in the seating areas as the camera makes a complete circuit around the central structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic outdoor plaza with circular bar seating

agents.ego_description: walking along the right side of the circular bar, observing the neon-lit seating area

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing sitting on neon stool at the bar

entered.detail: curved white counter with cyan neon underlighting wrapping around the central tree
glowing purple bar stools with neon outlines arranged along the circular bar
massive tree trunk rising through the center of the circular bar structure
illuminated storefront sign reading 'AVANTE' on the building facade
floating digital billboards and holographic displays suspended above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk night plaza with a futuristic circular bar as the focal point. The camera walks along the right side of the white neon-lit counter where NPCs sit on glowing purple stools. Holographic advertisements float above, and the AVANTE building sign is visible in the background through the rain.

events.description: moving from open plaza into the covered booth seating area with white canopy

agents.ego_description: continuing around the circular path, passing the curved booth seating on the left

notable_agents.action: person in leopard print jacket sitting at the curved booth table

entered.detail: semicircular black leather seating booth with integrated table and neon accents
large white umbrella-like canopy providing shelter over the booth seating
wide stone staircase leading up to an elevated level in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a semi-covered seating area featuring curved leather booths under white canopies. A person in a distinctive leopard print jacket sits at the nearest booth while the circular bar curves away to the right. The stone stairs become visible in the background as the camera continues its circular path around the central tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear plaza area behind the central bar

agents.ego_description: walking along the back side of the circular bar, moving past various seated individuals

notable_agents.action: man in white fedora and vest looking at his phone while leaning on the bar

entered.detail: circular illuminated sign with green neon border on the building facade
transparent glass safety railing along the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving to the rear of the plaza, the camera passes a man in a white fedora using his phone at the bar. The circular bar is now on the left side of the frame as the camera continues its circuit. Neon signs and glass railings line the right side while the central tree dominates the middle ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: front plaza area approaching the starting point

events.description: completing the circular path and approaching the original starting position

agents.ego_description: completing the circuit around the central bar, approaching the stairs and initial viewpoint

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking up the stone stairs in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment completes the circular tour around the plaza, returning to the front area near the starting point. The circular bar swings back to the right side of the frame, and the AVANTE sign becomes visible again in the distance. Various NPCs are seen walking and sitting as the camera finishes its circuit of the futuristic outdoor seating area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous circular camera movement through a rainy cyberpunk plaza, orbiting a futuristic outdoor bar and its central tree. It begins by gliding along the right side of a white neon-lit counter where NPCs occupy glowing purple stools beneath floating holographic advertisements and the distant AVANTE sign. As the camera progresses, the scene shifts into a semi-covered seating area with curved leather booths and white canopies, passing a person in a leopard print jacket while stone stairs emerge in the background. The perspective then moves to the rear of the plaza, where the circular bar swings to the left side of the frame as the camera passes a man in a white fedora amidst a backdrop of neon signs and glass railings. Finally, the circuit completes its loop by returning to the front of the plaza, bringing the AVANTE sign back into view as the bar shifts once more to the right.
